features: Original Source: We capture the intensity nature has to offer. Original Source is made with 100 Percent natural fragrances, we’re inspired by nature, from bold scents and vibrant colours, we've made it our mission to share fresh sensorial hits in every shower

The Power of Nature: 15,854 tingling real mint leaves sourced from India and 100 Percent natural fragrance have been packed in every bottle of shower gel. The tea tree adds extra freshness to awaken your senses to make the freshest body wash you’ll ever use

100 Percent Vegan and Cruelty Free Original Source is proudly vegan and we carry the logo on all products. Products are tested on us, never on animals. This fragrance is created to offer a shower experience to stimulate the senses with an intense hit of nature
Paraben free: The Mint and Tea Tree shower wash has been consciously made without parabens
Shower gel mutlipack: Extend your daily dose of freshness and nature with this 6 x 500 ml shower gel multipack
description: Product Description A shower gel multipack with 6 bottles bursting with a different and fresh fragrance! Shower gel doesn’t get any more tingly than famous Mint & Tea Tree body wash. We pack 7,927 tingling mint leaves and 100 Percent natural fragrance into every bottle for a fresh and tingly shower sensation. Mint is sourced from the Indian Mint Belt, located just south of the Himalayan range. The crop is handpicked by farmers and the oil is distilled in the same fields to ensure its freshness. The variety of Mint we use is called MENTHA ARVENSIS because of its high and consistent level of menthol to give you the intense shower experience - the ultimate wake up call. Products are tested on us, never on animals, paraben free and we’re proud to be Vegan too. Original Source Shower Gel is manufactured in the UK using 100 Percent renewable energy and our bottles are 100 Percent recyclable. Enjoy your daily shower time with a sensorial hit of nature. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Mentha Arvensis (Peppermint) Leaf Oil, Sodium Chloride, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Oil, Lactic Acid, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Sodium Benzoate, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, BHT, Limonene, CI 42090, CI 19140. Manufacturer Contact Information Freepost PZ Cussons (UK) Ltd 3500 Aviator Way, Manchester M22 5TG See more
